tools.name: cards.deleteCrmV3ExtensionsCardsAppIdCardIdArchive
tools.description: Permanently deletes a card definition with the given ID. Once deleted, data fetch requests for this card will no longer be sent to your service. This can't be undone.

tools.name: cards.getCrmV3ExtensionsCardsAppIdCardIdGetById
tools.description: Returns the definition for a card with the given ID.

tools.name: cards.getCrmV3ExtensionsCardsAppIdGetAll
tools.description: Returns a list of cards for a given app.

tools.name: cards.patchCrmV3ExtensionsCardsAppIdCardIdUpdate
tools.description: Update a card definition with new details.

tools.name: cards.postCrmV3ExtensionsCardsAppIdCreate
tools.description: Defines a new card that will become active on an account when this app is installed.

tools.name: sampleResponse.getCrmV3ExtensionsCardsSampleResponseGetCardsSampleResponse
tools.description: Returns an example card detail response. This is the payload with displayed details for a card that will be shown to a user. An app should send this in response to the data fetch request.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
